results.headline: Q2C zero-touch automation — currently scoping
results.description: We're designing a 24/7 Quote-to-Cash pipeline for a PE-backed European IoT operator — contract capture, credit check, ERP booking, and dispatch — across eight regions. Board-ready business case delivers mid-May.

results.headline: Operations that don't wait for office hours
results.description: International B2B credit decisions commonly sit in a 1–2 day manual queue, waiting on daytime reviews. Automated decision paths collapse that to a sub-10-second decision — the same pattern repeats across onboarding, dispatch, and post-sale workflows.
